series_metadata.series_title: PROJECTS-OHIO HIGHER EDUCATION FACILITIES COMMISSION - PROJECTS
series_metadata.series_description: Projects funded through bond purchase for construction, renovation, housing, and equipment for private colleges and universities.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until audited, record center for 10 years or until bonds have been fully defeased, then review by State Archives for historical value., Paper: Archives
